name: Uruguay in Wines
tagline: Searchable database of Uruguayan wines with professional tasting notes
description: A public wine catalog showcasing Uruguayan wines with professional tasting notes by wine critic Gabi Zimmer. Features a searchable and filterable data table with wines organized by winery, region, grape variety, and vintage. Includes an admin panel for managing wines and users, with Cloudinary-hosted images and Docker deployment.
highlights: Searchable wine catalog with advanced filtering by region, grape, and vintage
Professional tasting notes by wine critic Gabi Zimmer
Admin panel with full CRUD for wines and user management
Cloudinary image hosting for wine labels and tasting notes
